request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know foreign tech giants are exploiting our strategic autonomy? While we debate domestic policies, they're quietly controlling our critical infrastructure. Recent reports show 72% of our key systems rely on overseas tech with backdoor vulnerabilities. Our allies are waking up - France just passed strict autonomy laws. Shouldn't we? #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
